agents.name: Weekly report of CS Hosts on KEV Catalog
agents.description:
Retrieve a list of record results.

Link to documentation: https://www.tines.com/api/records/list

local.final_payload:
=REJECT(
  LOCAL.optional_parameters,
  LAMBDA(
    item,
    OR(
      item = NULL,
      IF(
        OR(
          TYPE(item) = "TrueClass",
          TYPE(item) = "FalseClass",
          TYPE(item) = "Integer"
        ),
        IS_EMPTY(TEXT(item)),
        IS_EMPTY(item)
      )
    )
  )
)

agents.name: List Catalog of Known Exploited Vulnerabilities in CISA

options.sender_name: Tines CrowdStrike CISA KEV Host report - Overview
options.subject: CISA KEV Catalog - CrowdStrike Host Report

options.guidance:
Summarize the top 10 Vulnerabilities by host count that have the known value in the ransomware_campaign key.

Output the summary as HTML.
options.script:
def main(input): data = input if isinstance(input, list) else [] # Filter for "Known" ransomware_campaign known = [v for v in data if v.get('ransomware_campaign', '').strip().lower() == 'known'] # Sort by host count descending and take top 10 top10 = sorted(known, key=lambda x: x.get('num_of_cs_host', 0), reverse=True)[:10] rows = "" for i, v in enumerate(top10, 1): rows += f""" {i} {v.get('cve_id', '')} {v.get('vuln_name', '')} {v.get('vendor', '')} {v.get('num_of_cs_host', 0):,} {v.get('date_added_kev', '')} """ if not rows: rows = 'No vulnerabilities with Known ransomware campaign found.' html = f""" Top 10 Vulnerabilities by Host Count (Known Ransomware Campaign)

Top 10 Vulnerabilities by Host Count — Known Ransomware Campaign

{rows}
# CVE ID Vulnerability Name Vendor Host Count Date Added (KEV)
""" return html

diagram_notes.content: This workflow runs the weekly CS Host report for devices that have CVEs on the CISA KEV Catalog querying Tines Records.
CISA KEV Catalog CrowdStrike host workflow
* If Tines Records are not enabled in the tenant, use this workflow for quick snapshot report of CrowdStrike hosts that have a vulnerability on the CISA KEV Catalog.

action_inputs.name: Tenant domain
action_inputs.description: The domain of the tenant.

action_inputs.name: Shared team names
action_inputs.description: Comma separated list of teams' names where this resource can be used. Required to set 'read access' parameter to 'SPECIFIC_TEAMS'.

action_inputs.name: Folder ID
action_inputs.description: ID of the folder where the resource will be located. You can identify the folder ID within the URL of your Tines tenant on the tenant overview page by selecting an item within the folder.

action_inputs.name: Read access
action_inputs.description: Control where this resource can be used. Defaults to 'team'. The 'specific teams' option is a premium feature that may not be available in your tenant and if used requires the additional parameter 'Shared team names'.

action_inputs.name: Description
action_inputs.description: Description of the resource.

action_inputs.name: Resource ID
action_inputs.description: The ID of the resource you are querying for. You can identify this with the INFO key.

action_inputs.name: Resource name
action_inputs.description: Name of the resource.

action_inputs.name: Test resource enabled?
action_inputs.description: Select 'yes' if the resource is enabled for using a test resource.

action_inputs.name: Is test resource?
action_inputs.description: Select 'yes' if the updated value should apply to the test resource rather than the live resource.

action_inputs.name: JSON resource value
action_inputs.description: The value of the resource. This can be an object with key/value pairs or an array of values. If you'd like to update a different part of the resource and keep the same value, just use a pill in formula mode referencing your resource.

action_inputs.name: Tenant domain
action_inputs.description: The domain of the tenant.

action_inputs.name: Resource ID
action_inputs.description: The ID of the resource you are querying for. You can identify this with the INFO key.

action_inputs.name: Is test resource?
action_inputs.description: Select 'yes' to append an element to the test resource.

action_inputs.name: Array value
action_inputs.description: The array to append to the resource. Use this input instead of the 'Text value' input if you are appending an array.

action_inputs.name: Text value
action_inputs.description: The text to append to the resource. Use this input instead of the 'Array value' input if you are just appending text.

action_inputs.name: Tenant domain
action_inputs.description: The domain of the tenant.

action_inputs.name: Range start
action_inputs.description:
The start time for the time range of record results. 

Note: using the calendar option will default the time to 00:00.

action_inputs.name: Range end
action_inputs.description:
The end time for the time range of record results. 

Note: using the calendar option will default the time to 00:00.

action_inputs.name: Record type ID
action_inputs.description: The ID of the record result to retrieve. Identify the record ID using the INFO key. Optional if record field IDs are specified.

action_inputs.name: Order field ID
action_inputs.description: The ID of the field used to order the record results (order specified by 'sort direction order' parameter). Identify the field ID using the INFO key.

action_inputs.name: Sort direction order
action_inputs.description: Sorts the list in ascending or descending order. Defaults to descending. Identify the ID to sort by in the 'order field ID' parameter.

action_inputs.name: Story IDs
action_inputs.description: Comma separated list of story IDs to filter the results.

action_inputs.name: Record field IDs
action_inputs.description: Comma separated list of record field IDs to filter the results. Identify the record field ID using the INFO key. Optional if record type ID is specified.

action_inputs.name: Test mode
action_inputs.description: Select 'yes' to filter by records created in 'test' mode for stories with change control. Defaults to 'no'.

action_inputs.name: Page
action_inputs.description: The page number of results to fetch. Relevant for queries with multiple pages of results

action_inputs.name: Per page
action_inputs.description: Set the number of record results returned per page. Defaults to 20, maximum is 500.
